description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2025 Porsche Taycan Turbo GT, 105kWh, 4WD, 1019bhp, 1 Speed Auto. AED 579,000 or AED 9,071 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 1415 KM's - Porsche Warranty Valid Until March 2027 (Extendable) - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Weissach Package - Shade Green Metallic - Side Logo ‘Weissach’ on the Rear Wing in Silver - GT interior package with Race-Tex and leather items, including contrasts in GT Silver - 21-inch Turbo GT Forged Lightweight Wheels - Full Bucket Seats - Porsche Electric Sport Sound - Light Strip with illuminated 'PORSCHE' Logo Black - Storage Package - Contrasts in GT Silver - Seat Belts GT-Silver - Pedals Aluminium - Door sill guards in Carbon matt, illuminated (i.c.w. inner Door Sill Guards) - Inner Door Sill Guards Race-Tex - Smoker Package - BOSE® Surround Sound System - Porsche Mobile Charger Connect
